root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, someone hid an oil barrel near the pool. That was where the stench was coming from.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is certainly odd to call all this a mere coincidence. The theater club's play was also canceled due to circumstances.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait a minute. Does that mean that someone's trying to sabotage our festival tomorrow?
